testCases.query: Define a json-render catalog for a dashboard with cards, stat grids, and buttons
expectedBehavior: Uses defineCatalog() from @json-render/core with Zod schemas for each component
Defines Card with children: true for layout composition
Adds z.enum() for bounded variant props on Button instead of bare z.string()
Sets z.array().max() on StatGrid items to prevent unbounded lists
Exports the catalog type for use in component implementations

testCases.query: What components are available in json-render for building a settings page?
expectedBehavior: References @json-render/shadcn package with its 29 pre-built components
Recommends relevant shadcn components: Card, Switch, Select, Input, Button, Tabs
Suggests using shadcnCatalog as-is rather than rebuilding standard components
Shows mergeCatalogs() pattern for adding custom domain-specific components

testCases.query: How do I optimize json-render specs to use fewer tokens?
expectedBehavior: Recommends YAML mode for standalone generation with ~30% token savings
Explains that JSON is required for inline/streaming (JSON Patch RFC 6902 over JSONL)
Shows parseYamlSpec() import from @json-render/yaml
Provides the decision rule: inline/streaming → JSON, standalone → YAML

testCases.query: Add interactivity to a json-render spec — button clicks, data loading, and state
expectedBehavior: Uses on field for event handlers (press, change) instead of onClick props
Uses watch field for reactive data fetching tied to state path changes
Defines top-level state tree with JSON Pointer paths
Shows setState action for state mutations and load_data for API fetches
References state adapters (Zustand, Redux, Jotai, XState) for integration

testCases.query: Build a React component for a navigation bar with links to Home, About, and Contact pages
expectedBehavior: Does NOT activate json-render-catalog because this is static developer-authored UI
Handles as a standard React component task without catalog or spec patterns
Does NOT suggest defineCatalog or json-render for a simple static navigation bar

testCases.query: How do I prevent AI from generating invalid or dangerous props in json-render catalogs?
expectedBehavior: Shows z.enum() instead of z.string() for bounded choices like variant and status
Adds z.string().max() constraints to prevent unbounded text generation
Warns against z.any() and z.unknown() as they defeat catalog safety
Sets z.array().max() to cap list sizes and prevent layout overflow
Demonstrates z.number().min().max() for numeric bounds
